title: Stainless Steel Dog Bowls | Cat Bowls (Pack of 2) - Anti Skid & Non Tip Dog Water Bowl | Cat Water Bowl Set - Dishwasher Safe - 32 Oz - 950 ml - 23 cm Diameter (Elegant Silver Stripes)
features: Stylish & Durable Stainless Steel Design: The Happinesque Stainless Steel Dog Bowls / Cat Bowls (Pack of 2) feature an elegant silver stripe design with an inside matt finish. Made from premium quality stainless steel, this rust-resistant, safe, and odour-free dog food bowl / cat food bowl set is a safer alternative to plastic bowls. Perfect as dog food bowls, dog water bowls, cat food bowls, and cat water bowl set.

Anti-Skid & No Noise Feeding: Equipped with a bonded silicon bottom, these Non Tip Anti-Skid Dog Bowls prevent sliding, making them perfect as a no spill water bowl for dogs or cat bowls. Enjoy a noise-free feeding experience while protecting your floors from scratches. Ideal as dog bowls medium sized dogs & dog bowls large breed.

Dishwasher Safe for Effortless Cleaning: Simplify maintenance with this dishwasher safe stainless steel bowl set for pets. Just place them in the dishwasher for a thorough clean, ensuring hygienic use.

Long-Lasting Silicon Bonded Base: Forget about rubber rings that crack or tear. Our stainless steel water bowl for dogs no spilling large dogs come with a durable silicon bonded base that stays intact and functional over time. Perfect for heavy-duty use.

Versatile Feeding Solution for All Pets: Designed with ample capacity for both food and water, this dog food and water bowl set suits dogs, cats, rabbits, guinea pigs, and more. Feed you furry friends with ease!
